name: FIRST MERCHANTS CORP
summary: PART I ITEM 1. BUSINESS GENERAL First Merchants Corporation (the Corporation) is a financial holding company headquartered in Muncie, Indiana and was organized in September 1982. The Corporations common stock is traded on the Nasdaq Global Select Market System under the symbol FRME. The Corporation has one full-service bank charter, First Merchants Bank, which opened for business in Muncie, Indiana in March 1893. The Bank also operates First Merchants Private Wealth Advisors (a division of First...
